forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Scattered rain showers before 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 48. Southwest wind around 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 59. Northwest wind 14 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph.

weather_report:
As the night deepens over Boston, a gentle quiet embraces the city, punctuated only by the soft patter of scattered rain showers that linger until the early hours. The clouds veil the sky, wrapping the landscape in an understated serenity, while the westward breeze, brisk and cool at fourteen miles per hour, dances through the stillness, heralding a change to come. The temperature dips to a cozy 48 degrees, inviting wearers of light jackets and sweaters to venture into the lingering dampness.

Come Saturday, the clouds will part, revealing a bright and sunlit day, the warmth of the sun contrasting with the chilly northwest winds that will sweep through at a notable pace. With the temperature reaching a pleasant 59 degrees, it will be a day to embrace the awakening of spring, ideal for a leisurely walk along the Esplanade or a casual visit to a local café. As you step out, perhaps layer a light sweater beneath a jacket, prepared for the wind gusts that will remind you of winter’s retreat. In these moments, the city reveals its charm, calling for simple pleasures that enrich the spirit, as life in Boston flows gracefully into a refreshing spring day.
